title: Private Event Charter
summary: Fully customized yacht charter for proposals, birthdays, weddings, or corporate events.
description: Tell us your vision and we'll design every detail — from route to decorations to photography. Premium service for your special occasion. Whether it's a marriage proposal on the water or a corporate retreat, we make it unforgettable.
imageAlt: Romantic sunset setup on private yacht for special occasions
tips: Book at least 4 weeks in advance for custom events
We accept special requests - just ask
Corporate events get dedicated event manager
seoTitle: Private Yacht Events & Celebrations | Marelune Bali
seoDescription: Book a private yacht for your special occasion in Bali. Proposals, birthdays, weddings on yacht - we handle every detail. Custom charter with premium service.
keywords: yacht proposal bali, yacht birthday bali, yacht wedding bali, corporate yacht bali
